title: shulker_plus
body:
Shulker Plus is a lightweight yet powerful mod designed to drastically improve inventory management in Minecraft. Forget about limited space: this mod expands every Shulker Box's capacity, making them the ultimate storage tool!

✨Features:
Double Capacity: Each Shulker Box goes from 27 to 54 slots, providing the same space as a Double Chest!

Seamless Integration: Works with all original colored Shulker Boxes.

Optimized for 1.21.11.

⚠️Technical Notes:
Sync Required: This mod must be installed on both the Server and the Client to work properly.

Warning: If the mod is uninstalled, items located in the extra slots (28-54) may be lost. Always back up your worlds!
